title: Add accessor functions for comment and stop signal
body:
Podman commit needs the ability to set a comment and stop signal
when committing a container to an image.  Adding set/get functions
for each.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: sit on this one while i work some edge case issues
Fixed up, should be good now.
@baude Waiting for the spelling error fix and then we can merge.
